title: Converge Guard signal protocol and lifecycle gate evidence

sources.reason: Work Item 9 unified Guard protocol objective.
Existing Trust Layer signal construction boundary.

riskAssessment.reason: Signals need a shared evidence shape without weakening existing block/ready behavior.

executionDecision.reason: Shared signal metadata and compatibility constraints are declared.

preReviewWarnings: Verify protocol metadata is additive and fail-closed decisions remain unchanged.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Guard signals expose signalId, state, confidence, evidence, policyReference, humanDecisionAllowed, and safeAlternatives.
Preflight and finish continue to interpret block, ready, partial, and inconsistent decisions without weakening existing guards.
Tests cover protocol shape and existing fail-closed paths.
Trust Layer documentation describes the shared protocol.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Guard signals currently carry evidence but do not expose one shared metadata protocol for policy references, confidence, safe alternatives, and human-decision boundaries.
constraints: Keep existing signal values and fail-closed behavior.
Confidence metadata must not change gate decisions.
intent.rationale: A shared signal envelope reduces cross-Guard interpretation drift while preserving each Guard's domain policy.

rawUserRequest: 继续执行第 9 个工单：统一 Guard 协议，补齐 Signal、Policy、Decision、Evidence Reference 和 Lifecycle Gate 接口，不削弱 fail-closed。

declaredIntent.summary: Add a shared additive Guard signal protocol without weakening decisions.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Ready Guard signal has shared metadata
Blocked critical-domain signal retains fail-closed decision
Human decision metadata does not authorize bypass

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized continuous execution of the complete remediation plan.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
